title: TypeScript conformance
summary: Agents writing, reviewing, or testing durable repository TypeScript and TSX MUST apply the TypeScript style and Node.js guidance unrolled into the active invocation together with the configured formatter.
instructions: Agents writing, reviewing, or testing TypeScript MUST apply the complete unrolled TypeScript and Node.js guidance included with this policy before completion.
Agents MUST run the configured formatter and type checker before completion and MUST treat formatter output as authoritative.

Workflow-local automation under runtime/logs/workflows/<run-id>/scripts/ MAY be throwaway and need not conform to the repository TypeScript style guidance unless it is promoted into durable repository code.
Agents MUST NOT reconstruct or separately load formatter-owned appendix rules during ordinary implementation or review unless they are changing formatter configuration or integration.
